commit.message:
Add QC system: sample classification, standard curve, NTC, replicate checks

- Auto-detect NTC and standard curve samples (C1-C5, STD, etc.) with click-to-toggle UI
- Standard curve QC: R2, slope, efficiency (MIQE criteria: R2 >= 0.98, efficiency 90-110%)
- NTC QC: contamination check (flag if NTC Ct within 5 cycles of experimental samples)
- Technical replicate QC: SD threshold flagging (< 0.5 Ct per MIQE)
- Per-target amplification rate and Ct range assessment
- Standards/NTCs automatically excluded from ddCt analysis
- QC report in configure step + dedicated QC tab in results
- CSV export includes QC data, statistics, and quality flags
- All criteria referenced to MIQE guidelines (Bustin et al., 2009)

commit.message:
Replace Reddit API with meme-api.com proxy

Reddit blocks Vercel IPs (403) and requires developer registration.
meme-api.com is a free Reddit meme proxy - no auth, no IP blocks.
Fetches from 8 random subreddits per request, always returns fresh memes.
Search is best-effort (title matching) since proxy doesn't support search.

commit.message:
Docs: M7 design foundation + code review

Pre-implementation documentation before new ship roster:

ship-roster.md — Complete 11-hull roster (Tiers 0–3) with stats, balance
  rationale, counter relationships, cost scale, and tags reference. No ship
  goes into code without appearing here first.

game-balance.md — Balance philosophy: counter web, budget economy, DPS/HP
  framework, TTK table, scenario balance guidelines, and "what to do when
  something feels wrong".

simulation-framework.md — Drift Command as a validated simulation prototype.
  Documents what each mechanic proves, the 3-layer AI architecture target,
  portability decisions, and what the next game looks like.

config-architecture.md — Separation plan for scattered constants: world dims,
  combat balance values, AI intervals, formation offsets, colors, sound names.
  Defines target file structure and migration priority order.

code-review-m6.md — Post-M6 audit findings. Security clean. 8 moderate/minor
  issues: duplicate world dims, scattered combat balance constants, O(n²) tempo
  and combat loops, stale tutorial text.

Updated: game-design-pillars.md (remove command_relay, update ship list),
  mvp-build-plan.md (mark M6 complete, update ship role table).

commit.message:
[feature] Phase-tiered model routing + pre-loaded corpus mode

Model routing by phase:
  - Light (flash-lite): scout, verifier, protocol — mechanical, cost-efficient
  - Pro (3.1-pro): deep_read, brancher — thorough analysis
  - Hypothesis (Opus/GPT-5.4): hypothesis, critic — gap identification
  - Writer (3.1-pro): writer, paper_critic, synthesis, advisory_board

Pre-loaded corpus mode (--import-papers DIR):
  - Ingests .txt, .md, .json, .pdf files from a directory
  - Marks all imported papers as selected for deep read
  - Auto-checkpoints scout/snowball/verifier/protocol/triage phases
  - Pipeline starts directly at fetch_texts -> deep_read
  - Supports JSON arrays of {title, abstract, authors, year, doi}

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

FIX: replace blocking urlopen with async httpx and add 60s TTL cache (#4)

- Swap urllib.request.urlopen for httpx.AsyncClient to eliminate thread-blocking I/O
- Make fetch_spy_market_data, get_radar, and the /api/radar route fully async
- Add module-level TTL cache (60 s) so the Massive API is not called on every request
- Add httpx to requirements.txt; remove unused ssl/certifi/json imports

commit.message:
fix: add expected_document_type to ToolExecutionContext

Field was used by executor.py but missing from the committed
version of tools.py, causing desempenho report generation to fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(3d): correct character face direction — π/2 offset in headingToRotY

Face texture is on +Z face (BoxGeometry index 4), but heading=0 means
facing +X in game space. With rotY=0 the local +Z pointed at world +Z
instead of +X, causing the face to appear on the side of the head.

Fix: headingToRotY returns `π/2 - heading` instead of `-heading` so
local +Z always aligns with the movement direction.

Affects: AgentInstances, HeadGroupManager, EyeInstances, EquipmentInstances

commit.message:
fix: cast duration/numeric params to int in all Higgsfield scripts, clean up proxy credit check

Duration was sent as string '10' instead of integer 10, causing Muapi 422 errors. Fixed in all 6 scripts. Removed redundant secondary credit check in proxy — trusts RPC exclusively. Added upstream error tagging (_upstream: true) to proxy responses so agents can distinguish our credit blocks from Muapi's own errors.
